extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won sprint after POGAČAR attacked for intermediate sprint bonus at 5.9km to go, taking 6 seconds on VINGEGAARD.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR prioritized intermediate sprint bonus seconds at 5.9km, forcing VINGEGAARD to chase but denying him time bonuses.
POWLESS attacked solo 16.4km out after earlier move with POGAČAR, revealing EF willingness to race aggressively despite sprint finish.
Quick-Step controlled under flamme rouge despite SÉNÉCHAL leading out, suggesting MERLIER trusted sprint positioning over pure leadout train.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: aggressively hunted intermediate sprint bonuses on opening stage, gaining 6 seconds on main GC rival before mountains
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: made first split but failed to contest intermediate sprint bonuses, conceding 6 seconds early
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: attacked twice including solo move 16.4km out, showing early-season form and willingness to animate racing
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: positive: won without traditional leadout train after SÉNÉCHAL rode ahead, demonstrating tactical flexibility in sprint chaos
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: second place suggests good positioning despite VAN POPPEL leadout not delivering him to final meters
